title: [FIRRTL][OMIR] Fix target instance path
body:
This commit fixes the target instance path according to the Extract Test Code logic.

1. If any target absolute path refers to a signal inside the Design Under Test, 
then truncate the absolute path to be rooted at the DUT module.
2. Special case for `dutInstance` , it should always be relative to the test bench. 
(SFC implementation in TestHarnessOMPhase.scala)
3. Add test cases for the above
